Project.title: Project
Project.description: A completed ad video log entry detailing work completed, video type, date, amount, and payment status.

id.description: Unique identifier of the video log.

type.description: Type of video (e.g. Advertising Video, Product Promo, etc.).

date.description: Date of completion in YYYY-MM-DD format.

notes.description: Optional notes or comments about the video.

paid.description: Whether the video has been paid for by the client.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the document was constructed.
